You may request to view, correct, or delete your personal information.
Other information is promptly destroyed once the purpose is fulfilled.
However, it may be provided if required by law.
문의 시: 이메일 주소, 문의 내용: When inquiring: Email address, inquiry details
Inquiries can be submitted to the contact below.
This policy may be changed as the service improves, and changes will be announced.
Some tasks may be outsourced within the scope necessary for service operation.
서비스 이용 시 자동 수집: IP 주소, 브라우저 정보, 접속 로그: Automatically collected during service use: IP address, browser info, access logs
업로드한 파일: 퀴즈 생성 목적의 처리 과정에서 일시적으로 저장: Uploaded files: Temporarily stored during quiz generation processing
Uploaded files are automatically deleted within 24 hours after processing.
In principle, we do not provide information to third parties.
When outsourced, we manage and supervise in accordance with applicable laws.
5. 개인정보의 제3자 제공: 5. Provision of Personal Information to Third Parties
7. 정보주체의 권리·의무 및 행사 방법: 7. Rights and Obligations of Data Subjects and How to Exercise Them
AI 추론 (Vertex AI/Gemini), 임시 파일 저장 (GCS): AI inference (Vertex AI/Gemini), temporary file storage (GCS)
AI 퀴즈 생성 기능 제공: Providing the AI quiz generation feature
AI 호출 로그, 서술형 채점 로그: AI call logs, free-response grading logs
Provider ID, prompt, AI 응답, 모델·토큰·응답시간: Provider ID, prompt, AI response, model, tokens, response time
You may apply to the following agencies for dispute mediation and consultation regarding personal information infringement.
법령에 따라 보관이 요구되는 경우 해당 기간 동안 분리 보관 후 파기합니: When retention is required by law, the data is stored separately for the relevant period and then destroyed.
본 처리방침은 법령·정책 변경에 따라 개정될 수 있으며, 변경 시 시행일: This policy may be revised in response to changes in laws or policies, and changes will be announced within the service 7 days before the effective date (30 days before for changes unfavorable to users). However, changes that benefit users or urgent responses to laws or security may take effect immediately.
부정 이용 방지·보안 (Rate Limiting, 어뷰징 감지): Fraud prevention and security (rate limiting, abuse detection)
서비스 품질 개선·운영 (오류 추적, 성능 분석): Service quality improvement and operations (error tracking, performance analysis)
업로드 파일(PDF/PPT/DOCX), 커스텀 지시사항, 생성한 퀴즈,: Uploaded files (PDF/PPT/DOCX), custom instructions, generated quizzes, solving records, answers, posts and comments
원본 파일·이미지 저장: Storage of original files and images
이용자 삭제 또는 회원 탈퇴 시까지: Until user deletion or account withdrawal
이용자가 Google·Kakao 소셜 로그인을 통해 가입·로그인하는 경우: When users sign up or log in via Google or Kakao social login, the Company receives a Provider ID from that provider. Please refer to each provider's site for their privacy policy.
이용자는 개인정보 열람·정정·삭제·처리정지·동의 철회 권리를 행사할 수: Users may exercise rights to access, correct, delete, suspend processing of, and withdraw consent for their personal information. Nickname changes and some data deletions can be performed directly within the service; for other rights, please contact contact@q-asker.com.
최대 90일 (운영·보안 목적): Up to 90 days (operations and security purposes)
탈퇴 시 회원 계정과 콘텐츠(퀴즈 세트, 풀이 기록, 게시글)가 삭제됩니: Upon withdrawal, the member account and content (quiz sets, solving records, posts) are deleted.
Solving records and posts can be deleted directly by users within the service.
회사는 「개인정보보호법」 제26조에 따라 수탁자의 안전한 처리를 관리·감: The Company manages and supervises the safe processing of processors in accordance with Article 26 of the Personal Information Protection Act.
회사는 HTTPS(TLS) 암호화 통신, JWT 기반 접근 제어, DB: The Company protects personal information through HTTPS (TLS) encrypted communication, JWT-based access control, Jasypt encryption of sensitive DB configuration values, Bucket4j-based rate limiting, and Cloudflare/OCI firewalls. The number of personnel handling data is minimized and access is managed on a role basis.
회사는 만 14세 이상을 서비스 대상으로 합니다. 만 14세 미만의 가입: The Service is intended for users aged 14 and over. Sign-up by those under 14 is restricted, and any data collected without legal-guardian consent will be deleted immediately upon discovery.
회사는 원칙적으로 개인정보를 제3자에게 제공하지 않습니다. 다만 이용자가: As a rule, the Company does not provide personal information to third parties. Exceptions apply when the user has given prior consent or when there is a lawful request under applicable laws.
회사는 위 목적 외 용도(특히 AI 모델 학습, 마케팅, 제3자 판매)로: The Company does not use personal information for purposes other than those listed above — in particular, not for AI model training, marketing, or sale to third parties.
회원 식별 및 서비스 제공 (OAuth 인증, 이용자별 퀴즈 기록 관리): Member identification and service provision (OAuth authentication, per-user quiz history management)
회원 탈퇴는 contact@q-asker.com 으로 요청하며, 영업일: Account withdrawal is requested via contact@q-asker.com and processed within 7 business days.
Q-Asker(이하 \"서비스\")는 「개인정보보호법」을 준수하며, 이용: Q-Asker (hereinafter the "Service") complies with the Personal Information Protection Act and establishes and discloses this policy to safely protect users' personal information.
서비스는 「개인정보보호법」 제26조에 따라 수탁자의 안전한 처리를 관리·: The Service manages and supervises the safe processing of processors in accordance with Article 26 of the Personal Information Protection Act.
서비스는 HTTPS(TLS) 암호화 통신, JWT 기반 접근 제어, DB: The Service protects personal information through HTTPS (TLS) encrypted communication, JWT-based access control, Jasypt encryption of sensitive DB configuration values, Bucket4j-based rate limiting, and Cloudflare/OCI firewalls. The number of personnel handling data is minimized and access is managed on a role basis.
서비스는 만 14세 이상을 서비스 대상으로 합니다. 만 14세 미만의 가: The Service is intended for users aged 14 and over. Sign-up by those under 14 is restricted, and any data collected without legal-guardian consent will be deleted immediately upon discovery.
서비스는 원칙적으로 개인정보를 제3자에게 제공하지 않습니다. 다만 이용자: As a rule, the Service does not provide personal information to third parties. Exceptions apply when the user has given prior consent or when there is a lawful request under applicable laws.
서비스는 위 목적 외 용도(특히 AI 모델 학습, 마케팅, 제3자 판매): The Service does not use personal information for purposes other than those listed above — in particular, not for AI model training, marketing, or sale to third parties.
이용자가 Google·Kakao 소셜 로그인을 통해 가입·로그인하는 경우: When users sign up or log in via Google or Kakao social login, the Service receives a Provider ID from that provider. Please refer to each provider's site for their privacy policy.
